text: Decision: keep the execution roots parallel and evidence-driven. Allocation profiling gates dense destination and generalized workspace work; immutable compressed patterns and solve-capability traits can proceed independently. Symbolic sparse plans require patterns plus the shared workspace contract, and the optional JVM direct-factorization seam is last. The epic deliberately rejects public raw-array adoption, aliased mutable matrix views, a generic scalar/storage rewrite, and any unsupported sparse-direct capability claim. Design references: https://docs.rs/faer/latest/src/faer/linalg/mod.rs.html ; https://docs.rs/faer/latest/faer/sparse/index.html ; https://docs.rs/nalgebra-sparse/latest/nalgebra_sparse/pattern/struct.SparsityPattern.html
